title: Lucipo's Hoplite PvP Pack - Cosmic Pink
description:
16x PvP Pack with Hoplite-Specific Additions!
Cosmic Pink Edition
body:
# Lucipo's Hoplite PvP Pack `Cosmic Pink Edition`

After far too long of a development, it's finally here!

This pack is filled with PvP Utilities and Additions seen nowhere else 🗣️🔥💯


**Blue Edition can be found at https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/lucipos-hoplite-pvp-pack-blue**


![Cosmicpink](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d7cd4daa6cd8d2114eeff084b87c8f952fc2b38a_0.webp)
![inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/36d1bf300572f27e9f12970c46cb16e1a4569991.png)

![hotbar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/792a3da28d7e9d51233ae9ac8ab08a6aabc1480e.png)

## Pack Features

<details>
<summary>PvP</summary>

- Big Golden Heads + Notch Apples in hand + on ground `Requires CIT Resewn`

     ![ghead and gap notch](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dee38dc2902e997ddcdf3a201e2d52779b0f3efa.png)

- Custom Textures to Easier Differentiate Vanilla and Hoplite Items

    ![hoplite custom tools on bottom and normal on top](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e4e51887d9ce67b5880b75cbf3160fe25f99e18d.png) 

- Louder, crunchier grass step sounds + louder Ghead Eat sounds
- Fleshier hit sounds (It's the Beta 1.8 damage sound)
- Outlined Cobwebs

   ![cobweb with outline](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a3fe8ad0428b6b36ec607a996b96e533fe4a0cc9.png)

- Clearer Water Source Blocks for Draining

     ![water source with middle source block transparent](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3ed4024cb7671b61a0813515d2e70c84e556414f_0.webp)

</details>




<details>
<summary>Cosmetic</summary>

- Legendary Tooltips for All Hoplite Items and Cosmetics `Requires Legendary Tooltips Mod`

     ![tooltips](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8bdba43c188895ae3327f78cd2cb35d1454ab871.png)

- Randomized Bundle Textures for easier sorting `Requires CIT Resewn`

     ![bundles](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/13c2a3c6ed2b9582af4af4eec3bafa27f91255ca.png)

- Nostalgic sounds for explosions, doors, arrows, and more!

</details>



<details>
<summary>Utility</summary>

- Emissive/Glowing Diamond + Gold Ores `Requires Continuity, See Gallery`

     __Has massively increased visibility of ores in caves, you wont ever miss gold or diamonds again!__

     <sub>The ores dont actually flash, its just showing no glow vs glow</sub>

     ![Before: no glow, after: glowing ores](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aabc17d4fb0d467d800494961fe95273acad8fb2.gif)

- All important items and legendary materials are BIG!

     ![BIG ITEMS ON GROUND](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b67c6fbb9f7117e7ad794cb42794461a499f95cf.png)

- Small offhand totems + transparent doors
- Highlighted Buckets for easier utility

     ![bucket](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/91cbe77295f620f8c3f68b348589f7fb3ac416d2.png)

- Red Powder Snow

    ![red powder senow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e37934065ea07eb4149dfa1c44934492212e7a5_0.webp)

- Blue Ancient Debris

     ![blue ancient debris](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e7f13a7d0832fe594813af237bffe9751d791dd.png)

- Invisible Horse Heads
- Visible Bee Nest Stages
- Harvestable Amethyst Notifier


</details>


### — Optional Mods
- [Legendary Tooltips](https://modrinth.com/mod/legendary-tooltips) for Awesome Tooltips
- [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) for Big Gheads + Custom Notch texture +  Bundle Colors
- [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) for Glowing Ores
- Optifine should also work as an alternative for CIT Resewn and Continuity
### — Other Mod Support
- [Appleskin](https://modrinth.com/mod/appleskin) for Saturation
- [Detailed Armor Bars](https://modrinth.com/mod/detail-armor-bar) for Armor Bar dependent on Worn Armor

### — Credit
- Itle for the Cosmic Pink Idea
- [Cobweb Outlines](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/web)
- [Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/)
- [Celestial GUI](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/celestial-gui) for all the GUI's 
- Asahi Serizawa for Totem + Inspiration
- [Sweatgod 20k Pack](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8WCY0aa8cXE) for certain GUI textures

Also if you want the cool skies seen in the gallery, grab the [Awesome Skies Pack](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/awesome-skies)!
